events.eventbuspolicy.condition.Key.Docs: Specifies the key for the condition. Currently the only supported key is `aws:PrincipalOrgID`.

events.eventbuspolicy.condition.Type.Docs: Specifies the type of condition. Currently the only supported value is `StringEquals`.

events.eventbuspolicy.condition.Value.Docs: Specifies the value for the key. Currently, this must be the ID of the organization.
